columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Zip Codes' (87xh-ddyp) the point in column 'location' is located. This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

description: The Prince George’s County Police Department (PGPD) provides the displayed data as a service to our community. The included data does not represent every call for service handled by PGPD. Information is provided regarding traffic accidents, assaults, burglaries, homicides, robberies, sex offenses, stolen vehicles, thefts and vandalisms where a report has been written. Included information for any of these events has been modified to remove specific address location. In order to provide victim co

name: layer_1
description: This layer contains a geospatial representation of the center of the paved surface of a travel roadway for all public and some private streets in Prince George's County, Maryland. Attributes for the centerline contain street information, routing functionality, and class type. The line work was created from the 1993 1FT aerial imagery and the attributes were entered by CENTECH Inc. This layer is maintained by Prince George's County Office of Information Technology and is primarily used to support

name: 2-Year IBR Crime Offenses
provider: Prince George's County Police Department - Joint Analysis Intelligence Center (JAIC)

columns.name: Division
columns.description: The Prince George's County Police Division in which the incident occurred.

columns.name: Municipality
columns.description: The Municipal corporation, if any, in which the incident was reported.

columns.name: LocationType
columns.description: The general location type at which the incident occurred.

columns.name: ReportingAgency
columns.description: The police agency responsible for the area in which the incident occurred.

columns.name: Offense_IBR_CrimeAgainst
columns.description: The UCR/NIBRS Offense "Crime Against" value.

columns.name: Offense_IBR_Code
columns.description: The UCR/NIBRS Offense code.

columns.name: Offense
columns.description: The UCR/NIBRS Offense.

columns.name: OccurredOn
columns.description: The Date/Time that the incident occurred.

columns.name: CaseNumber
columns.description: Internal Records Management System Case Number of the report associated with this offense. A Case Number can have multiple reports, and each report can contain multiple offenses.

columns.name: ReportingArea
columns.description: The Reporting Area in which the incident occurred.

columns.name: OffenseCompleted
columns.description: Indicates whether the offense was completed. Will be "False" if the offense was an attempt only.

columns.name: PostalCode
columns.description: The ZIP/Postal code of the location at which the incident occurred.

columns.name: Beat
columns.description: The Beat in which the incident occurred.

description: This dataset contains basic information of all UCR/NIBRS offenses reported by the Prince George's County Police Department and participating municipal police agencies within Prince George's County. This dataset contains data from the previous 24 months.

name: Map of Polling Places in Election Precincts

name: Citizen, Voting-Age Population by Selected Characteristics
description: This dataset provides estimates of the voting-age population (persons 18 years and older) in Prince George’s County based on U.S. Census Bureau data, with detailed breakdowns by age group, sex, race and ethnicity, educational attainment, poverty status, and household income. It is designed to help users understand the demographic, socioeconomic, and educational characteristics of the county’s adult population that is eligible to participate in the electoral process, supporting research on civic

name: Educational Obtainment S1501
description: This dataset provides information on educational attainment in Prince George’s County, using data from the U.S. Census Bureau’s American Community Survey. It presents educational levels attained by residents, with breakdowns by age groups and race and ethnicity, and includes associated median earnings to illustrate economic outcomes by level of education. The dataset supports analysis of education-to-earnings relationships, workforce development, equity assessments, and community planning. All v

name: School Board Districts

columns.name: SHAPE.STLength()
columns.description: Represents the perimeter or boundary length of the district.

columns.name: Website_2
columns.description: Official website URL providing additional information about the district.

columns.name: the_geom
columns.description: Stores the geographic boundary  of the school board district as a polygon or multipolygon.

columns.name: District Name
columns.description: Official name of the school board district.

columns.name: OBJECTID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for each district record

columns.name: School Board Image URL
columns.description: Link to an image representing the school board or district.

columns.name: District ID
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to each district for reference and tracking.

columns.name: School Board Image URL_2
columns.description: Secondary image link related to the school board or district.

columns.name: SHAPE.STArea()
columns.description: Represents the total geographic area of the district.

description: This dataset represents the geographic boundaries of school board districts within the county. Each district corresponds to an elected school board member responsible for overseeing local education policies, budgets, and school system governance. The data supports planning, transparency, and public awareness of district representation.

description: This dataset provides 1-year American Community Survey (ACS) estimates from the U.S. Census Bureau on key occupancy characteristics for Prince George’s County households. It includes information on household size, occupants per room, household type, family composition, and whether children living in the household are the householder’s own children.

name: Prince George's County Census Veteran Status
description: This dataset provides estimates of the veteran population in Prince George’s County as reported by the U.S. Census Bureau’s American Community Survey (ACS). It includes the number and percentage of residents who identify as veterans, along with demographic characteristics such as gender and age. In addition, the dataset provides deeper insights through breakdowns by period of military service, employment status, median income, race and ethnicity, educational attainment, poverty status, and disab

description: This dataset presents financial characteristics for Prince George’s County using data from the U.S. Census Bureau’s American Community Survey. It includes information on household income, housing costs, and the percentage of household income spent on housing during the past 12 months, offering insight into economic conditions and housing affordability within the county. The data supports analysis of income distribution, cost burden, and financial stability for households and is based on survey e

name: Occupation of Civilian Employed Population 16 Years and Over by Gender
description: This dataset provides 1-year American Community Survey (ACS) estimates from the U.S. Census Bureau on the occupation distribution of the civilian employed population aged 16 years and over in Prince George’s County. It breaks down the workforce by major occupational categories and presents counts and percentages separately for males and females.
